Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Alsa]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — Alsa is Calder's mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — Alsa is a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — Alsa worked for the Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Alsa carries seven Awakened iron spikes in her coat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Alsa is a character who attempts to Read the heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Alsa was the subject of an initial attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Alsa suggested that Bliss would be back soon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 15''' — Alsa offered to accompany Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Alsa does not trust Calder with the laundry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Alsa is a person who Awakened a saber.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Alsa carries a saber and a pistol.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
